calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Paxton.
Yosef Peretz, Esq. for Petitioner: Teresa pagano, present as Guardian ad litem for: Darien Tillman and Chartera Daniels, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,800.00
No Costs.
A net balance for each minor of $2,700.00, payable to the Petitioner for the benefit of each minor.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
